\tzpentry{ID5730}{Phase Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5730 introduces Phase Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \phi(\mathbf{x},t) = \mathrm{e}^{\mathrm{i}(k_\mu x^\mu)}\, u(\mathbf{x}), \end{equation}
